blended.narrative: Eldora is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Strong winds with gusts to 45 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: clear skies, highs of 41°F, gusts to 45 mph.
Tomorrow: clear skies, highs of 45°F, gusts to 47 mph.
Saturday: partly cloudy, highs of 45°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
